Patch Set 11: Code-Review+1

When there are test failures as with the previous patch, please do not just rebase the patch without associating the test failures with some existing or new bug. Otherwise, it might mean that this patch has an intermittent failure and we just for lucky on the last test runs and it happened to pass the few test runs for this patch version. 

In this case it does seem unlikely that this patch would have caused anything except the sanity-hsm failure, and it appears to be some problem with the test environment, but there was no indication anywhere that this was investigated.
Patch Set 11: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 11: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 062275772df6ba9027710048f2c1ee26e5574a51

commit.subject: LU-4691 lmv: honor MDT index when creating volatile file
commit.message:
LU-4691 lmv: honor MDT index when creating volatile file

LMV should honor MDT index embedded in the name of volatile
file, then during hsm restore, the file under striped dir can
be restored to the right MDT.

Add test 405 in sanity-hsm to verify it.

Change-Id: I05170beee5255cf6581a2ea43edb6cc434a7cf8e
Signed-off-by: Wang Di <di.wang@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10866
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
